findings.title: Documented env var is not referenced by source

evidence.currentFact: The fixture source and .env.example reference `DATABASE_URL`, but not `LEGACY_FLAG`.

findings.suggestedAction: Remove LEGACY_FLAG from setup docs or add the source/config reference that uses it.
